specific_mechanism: Premunition: ongoing helminth infection trains the immune system into a tolerance basin — host carries worms without symptoms; new infections of the same species are blocked. Equilibrium is a stable basin in (worm-load × inflammation × cytokine) phase space, with explicit attractor dynamics.
llm_application: Premunition-style LLM safety: pre-train the model on a low-level continuous diet of benign adversarial probes ('worm load'), keeping the safety system in a tolerance basin. Reject probes that would push the model off the tolerance attractor. Distinct from training-time RLHF and from inference-time filtering — analogous to immune training rather than vaccination.
novelty_claim: MAGIC (2602.01539) and Stackelberg game (2507.08207) frame jailbreak as adversarial game equilibrium. Probing Latent Subspaces (2503.09066) uses LDA to find attractor states. Whether the explicit 'premunition' framing — continuous benign adversarial exposure for tolerance maintenance — is in print as a distinct mechanism is the question.
